relevant_files.signature: SessionData, SessionManager.createSession, ptyProcess.onExit, deleteSession, deleteMultipleSessions, getObservabilitySnapshot
relevant_files.relevance: Primary lifecycle anchor for PTY creation, delete, process-exit broadcast, multi-delete, and session observability.
Typed session config currently lacks processCleanup.
Strict defaults and validation site for session.processCleanup.
Bootstrap template currently emits session idle/running defaults only.
Human-facing config example needs processCleanup defaults.
Existing telemetry route can expose cleanup telemetry additively.
Regression tests can extend existing SessionManager fake PTY coverage.

related_modules: server/src/services/WorkspaceService.ts routes tab/workspace delete and restart to SessionManager.deleteSession/deleteMultipleSessions.
tools/daemon/process-info.js contains an existing PID identity pattern for reference only.
missing_evidence: No current cleanup telemetry for session-owned process metadata.
